top3.sql:
SELECT MAX(frpm.`Percent (%) Eligible Free (Ages 5-17)`)
FROM frpm
JOIN schools ON frpm.CDSCode = schools.CDSCode
JOIN satscores ON schools.CDSCode = satscores.cds
WHERE satscores.NumTstTakr > 0 
  AND (satscores.AvgScrRead + satscores.AvgScrMath + satscores.AvgScrWrite) / 3.0 >= 1500 * 0.3
  AND frpm.`Percent (%) Eligible Free (Ages 5-17)` IS NOT NULL;

SELECT MAX(frpm."Percent (%) Eligible Free (Ages 5-17)") 
FROM frpm 
JOIN schools ON frpm.CDSCode = schools.CDSCode 
JOIN satscores ON schools.CDSCode = satscores.cds 
WHERE satscores.NumTstTakr > 0 
  AND (satscores.NumGE1500 * 1.0 / satscores.NumTstTakr) > 0.3;

SELECT MAX(frpm.`Percent (%) Eligible Free (Ages 5-17)`)
FROM frpm
JOIN schools ON frpm.CDSCode = schools.CDSCode
JOIN satscores ON schools.CDSCode = satscores.cds
WHERE satscores.NumTstTakr > 0 
  AND (satscores.AvgScrRead + satscores.AvgScrMath + satscores.AvgScrWrite) / 3.0 >= 1500 * 0.3
  AND frpm.`Percent (%) Eligible Free (Ages 5-17)` IS NOT NULL;

SELECT MAX(frpm."Percent (%) Eligible Free (Ages 5-17)") 
FROM frpm 
JOIN schools ON frpm.CDSCode = schools.CDSCode 
JOIN satscores ON schools.CDSCode = satscores.cds 
WHERE satscores.NumTstTakr > 0 
  AND (satscores.NumGE1500 * 1.0 / satscores.NumTstTakr) > 0.3;

SELECT MAX(f."Percent (%) Eligible Free (Ages 5-17)")
FROM frpm f
JOIN satscores s ON f.CDSCode = s.cds
WHERE s.NumTstTakr > 0 
  AND CAST(s.NumGE1500 AS REAL) / s.NumTstTakr > 0.3;

SELECT MAX(frpm.`Percent (%) Eligible Free (Ages 5-17)`)
FROM frpm
JOIN schools ON frpm.CDSCode = schools.CDSCode
JOIN satscores ON schools.CDSCode = satscores.cds
WHERE satscores.NumTstTakr > 0 
  AND (satscores.AvgScrRead + satscores.AvgScrMath + satscores.AvgScrWrite) / 3.0 >= 1500 * 0.3
  AND frpm.`Percent (%) Eligible Free (Ages 5-17)` IS NOT NULL;

SELECT MAX(frpm."Percent (%) Eligible Free (Ages 5-17)") 
FROM frpm 
JOIN schools ON frpm.CDSCode = schools.CDSCode 
JOIN satscores ON schools.CDSCode = satscores.cds 
WHERE satscores.NumTstTakr > 0 
  AND (satscores.NumGE1500 * 1.0 / satscores.NumTstTakr) > 0.3;

SELECT MAX(f."Percent (%) Eligible Free (Ages 5-17)")
FROM frpm f
JOIN satscores s ON f.CDSCode = s.cds
WHERE s.NumTstTakr > 0 
  AND CAST(s.NumGE1500 AS REAL) / s.NumTstTakr > 0.3;

final.sql:
SELECT MAX(frpm.`Percent (%) Eligible Free (Ages 5-17)`)
FROM frpm
JOIN schools ON frpm.CDSCode = schools.CDSCode
JOIN satscores ON schools.CDSCode = satscores.cds
WHERE satscores.NumTstTakr > 0 
  AND (satscores.AvgScrRead + satscores.AvgScrMath + satscores.AvgScrWrite) / 3.0 >= 1500 * 0.3
  AND frpm.`Percent (%) Eligible Free (Ages 5-17)` IS NOT NULL;
